infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Photoshike needs camera access to overlay silhouettes on your live feed.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photoshike saves captured photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Photoshike saves captured photos to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Photoshike uses your camera to overlay silhouettes on the live feed.

plugins.photosPermission: Photoshike saves your captured photos to the gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Photoshike saves your captured photos to the gallery.
